comments.text: This is an excellent, informative and well presented video about how the country of Norway.  It clearly describes and shows how it is formed and operates based on its unique geography.  Thank you for posting.  Great stuff!

replies.text: I’m so glad you enjoyed the deep dive into how Norway’s unique geography shaped the country.
